Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************

 Grothendieck construction: the unit

 The Grothendieck construction gives a biequivalence between the
 bicategory of fibrations over a fixed category `C` and the bicategory
 of indexed categories over `C`. To construct this biequivalence, we
 need to construct the following:
 1. A pseudofunctor from the bicategory of fibrations to the bicategory
    of pseudofunctors
 2. A pseudofunctor from the bicategory of pseudofunctors to the
    bicategory of fibrations
 3. The unit and a proof that it is a pointwise adjoint equivalence
 4. The counit and a proof that it is a pointwise adjoint equivalence

 In this file, we construct the third part of this biequivalence, namely
 the unit.

 Contents
 1. Action on objects
 2. Action on 1-cells
 3. The data
 4. The laws
 5. The unit
 6. The action on objects forms an equivalence
 7. The unit is a pointwise adjoint equivalence

 ************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiber.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.FibrationToIndexedCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.CartesianToIndexedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.NatTransToIndexed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedCategoryToFibration.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedFunctorToCartesian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedTransformationToTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Discreteness.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.DiscreteBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.FibSlice.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.PseudoFunctorsIntoCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.Examples.PseudoTransformationIntoCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Examples.ModificationIntoCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Grothendieck.FibrationToPseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Grothendieck.PseudoFunctorToFibration.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section GrothendieckConstruction.
  Context {C : univalent_category}.

  Local Notation "'tr' P x" := (transportf P _ x) (at level 100, only printing).

  (**
   1. Action on objects
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) D

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) D

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ x : C,
indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
→ D (functor_identity C x)
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
         indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
         → D (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C)
 (xx : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x)
 (yy : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y)
 (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[ # (functor_identity C) f] Fob y yy)
  ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ x : C,
indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
→ D (functor_identity C x)
 exact (λ x xx, xx).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
         indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
         → D (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C)
 (xx : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x)
 (yy : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y)
 (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[ # (functor_identity C) f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : C)
   (xx : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x),
   xx)
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ id₁ x] HD y x f yy → xx -->[ f] yy

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ id₁ x] HD y x f yy
id₁ x · f = f

      abstract (apply id_left).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data D
     HD)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data D
     HD)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x : C)
(xx : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x),
(♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
      D HD))%mor_disp (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD x xx)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD x xx))
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x y z : C)
(xx : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x)
(yy : pr1
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y)
(zz : pr1
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z)
(f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
(♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
      D HD))%mor_disp (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD x xx)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD) ff ;; ♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
                         D HD) gg)%mor_disp

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x : C)
(xx : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x),
(♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
      D HD))%mor_disp (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD x xx)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD x xx))
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
    (transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
          x) (id_disp xx)) ;; HD x x (id₁ x) xx)%mor_disp) =
id_disp xx

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
   (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
      x) (id_disp xx)) = id_disp xx

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx)) =
id_disp xx

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) =
id_disp xx

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
isaset (C ⟦ x, x ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x y z : C)
(xx : indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x)
(yy : pr1
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y)
(zz : pr1
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z)
(f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
(♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
      D HD))%mor_disp (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD x xx)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
        D HD) ff ;; ♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data
                         D HD) gg)%mor_disp
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 ((tr mor_disp xx (HD z x (f · g) zz)
   (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x f (HD z y g zz))
    ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
            (HD y x f (HD z y g zz)) (id₁ x)
            (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
             HD y x f yy ;; gg)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (HD z x (f · g)
                                         zz) (id₁ x)
                                      (transportb
                                         (λ z0 : C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                          HD y x f
                                            (HD z y g
                                               zz) -->[
                                          z0] zz)
                                         (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                            g f)
                                         (HD y x f
                                            (HD z y g
                                               zz) ;; 
                                          HD z y g zz))) ;; 
  HD z x (f · g) zz)%mor_disp) =
((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff ;; HD y x f yy) ;; 
 (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, yy -->[ z0] zz
  gg ;; HD z y g zz))%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 ((tr mor_disp xx (HD z x (f · g) zz)
   (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x f (HD z y g zz))
    ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
            (HD y x f (HD z y g zz)) (id₁ x)
            (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
             HD y x f yy ;; gg)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (HD z x (f · g)
                                         zz) (id₁ x)
                                      (transportb
                                         (λ z0 : C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                          HD y x f
                                            (HD z y g
                                               zz) -->[
                                          z0] zz)
                                         (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                            g f)
                                         (HD y x f
                                            (HD z y g
                                               zz) ;; 
                                          HD z y g zz))) ;; 
  HD z x (f · g) zz)%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
   ff ;; HD y x f yy) ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (tr mor_disp xx zz
  (tr mor_disp xx zz
   (ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
            (HD y x f (HD z y g zz)) (id₁ x)
            (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
             HD y x f yy ;; gg) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD z x (f · g)
                                        zz) (id₁ x)
                                     (transportb
                                        (λ z0 : C ⟦ x,
                                                z ⟧,
                                         HD y x f
                                           (HD z y g
                                              zz) -->[
                                         z0] zz)
                                        (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                           g f)
                                        (HD y x f
                                           (HD z y g
                                              zz) ;; 
                                         HD z y g zz)) ;; 
    HD z x (f · g) zz)%mor_disp))) =
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (tr mor_disp xx zz
  (ff ;; HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
          (HD y x f (HD z y g zz)) (id₁ x)
          (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
           HD y x f yy ;; gg) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   (HD z x (f · g) zz)
                                   (id₁ x)
                                   (transportb
                                      (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z
                                              ⟧,
                                       HD y x f
                                         (HD z y g zz) -->[
                                       z0] zz)
                                      (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                         g f)
                                      (HD y x f
                                         (HD z y g zz) ;; 
                                       HD z y g zz)) ;; 
  HD z x (f · g) zz)%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (ff ;; HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (tr mor_disp xx zz
  (tr mor_disp xx zz
   (ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation
             (HD y x f (HD z y g zz)) (id₁ x)
             (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
              HD y x f yy ;; gg) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                       (HD z x (f · g)
                                          zz) (id₁ x)
                                       (transportb
                                          (λ z0 : 
                                              C ⟦ x, z
                                              ⟧,
                                           HD y x f
                                             (HD z y g
                                                zz) -->[
                                           z0] zz)
                                          (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                             g f)
                                          (HD y x f
                                             (HD z y g
                                                zz) ;; 
                                           HD z y g zz)) ;; 
                                     HD z x (f · g) zz)))%mor_disp))) =
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (tr mor_disp xx zz
  (ff ;; (HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation
           (HD y x f (HD z y g zz)) (id₁ x)
           (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
            HD y x f yy ;; gg) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD z x (f · g)
                                        zz) (id₁ x)
                                     (transportb
                                        (λ z0 : C ⟦ x,
                                                z ⟧,
                                         HD y x f
                                           (HD z y g
                                              zz) -->[
                                         z0] zz)
                                        (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                           g f)
                                        (HD y x f
                                           (HD z y g
                                              zz) ;; 
                                         HD z y g zz)) ;; 
                                   HD z x (f · g) zz)))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (ff ;; (HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp)

 (ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation

                                       g f)

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb (mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz)
  (assoc (id₁ x) f g)
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f (HD z y g zz))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
      HD y x f yy ;; gg) ;; HD y x f (HD z y g zz) ;; 
   HD z y g zz)%mor_disp = ?t2

        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
         HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (ff ;; (HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (tr mor_disp xx zz
  (ff ;; (HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp)) =
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (ff ;; (HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; (HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (ff ;; (HD y x f yy ;; (gg ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) y
zz: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (assoc f (id₁ y) g) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (cancel_postcomposition (f · id₁ y) (id₁ x · f) g
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (! assoc (id₁ x) f g) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          g f)) @
assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · (f · g)) @
assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (f · g) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x) (f · g)
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x))) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (f · g)
  (id_right (id₁ x)) @
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
  x z (f · g) =
assoc (id₁ x) f (id₁ y · g) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · f) f (id₁ y · g)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
     x y f) @
maponpaths (compose f)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
     y z g)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  Defined.

ff: psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)) y ⟦ yy,
(psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
   (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
      (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)) $ f) xx ⟧
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_z_isomorphism ff

        exact (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                    (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                       (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))
                  ff
                  Hff).

     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (HD x y f xx)
 apply cartesian_lift_is_cartesian.
  Qed.

  Transparent psfunctor_to_indexed_cat.

D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ FF : disp_functor (functor_identity C)
          (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                   (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) D,
 is_cartesian_disp_functor FF)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D HD)
 exact (is_cartesian_psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D HD).
  Defined.

  (**
   2. Action on 1-cells
   *)
  Definition psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural_data
             {D₁ D₂ : disp_univalent_category C}
             (HD₁ : cleaving D₁)
             (HD₂ : cleaving D₂)
             (F : cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₁ D₂)
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id _)
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D₁ HD₁)
           F)
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
              (pstrans_to_indexed_functor
                 (indexed_functor_to_pstrans
                    (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor HD₁ HD₂ F))))
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D₂ HD₂))
    := λ x xx, id_disp _.

  
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural_data HD₁
     HD₂ F)

  
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural_data HD₁
     HD₂ F)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ F
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
    ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy) ;; psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural_data
                             HD₁ HD₂ F y yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural_data HD₁
     HD₂ F x xx ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                       F x xx -->[ z] F y yy
                    (tr mor_disp (F x xx)
                          (HD₂ y x f (F y yy))
                     ♯ F ff ;; fiber_functor_natural_inv
                                 HD₁ HD₂ F f yy) ;; 
                    HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ F
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
    ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy) ;; id_disp
                             (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                   D₁ HD₁) F y yy))%mor_disp =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          D₁ HD₁) F x xx) ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 F x xx -->[ z] F y yy
                              (tr mor_disp (F x xx)
                                    (HD₂ y x f
                                       (F y yy))
                               ♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           (HD₂
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C y)
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C x)
                                              ((# 
                                                (functor_identity
                                                 C))%cat
                                                 f)
                                              (F y yy))
                                           (id₁
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C x))
                                           (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C x,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C y ⟧,
                                               F x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 y x f
                                                 yy)) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               F y yy
                                            ♯ F
                                              (pr12 
                                               (HD₁ y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)))) ;; 
                              HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  ♯ F (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy)) ;; id_disp
                                 (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                    (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                       D₁ HD₁) F y yy))%mor_disp =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          D₁ HD₁) F x xx) ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 F x xx -->[ z] F y yy
                              (tr mor_disp (F x xx)
                                    (HD₂ y x f
                                       (F y yy))
                               ♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           (HD₂
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C y)
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C x)
                                              ((# 
                                                (functor_identity
                                                 C))%cat
                                                 f)
                                              (F y yy))
                                           (id₁
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C x))
                                           (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C x,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C y ⟧,
                                               F x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 y x f
                                                 yy)) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               F y yy
                                            ♯ F
                                              (pr12 
                                               (HD₁ y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)))) ;; 
                              HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  ♯ F (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy)) ;; id_disp
                                 (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                    (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                       D₁ HD₁) F y yy))%mor_disp =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
           D₁ HD₁) F x xx) ;; ((tr mor_disp (F x xx)
                                     (HD₂ y x f
                                        (F y yy))
                                ♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                            (HD₂
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 C y)
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 C x)
                                               ((# 
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))%cat
                                                 f)
                                               (F y yy))
                                            (id₁
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 C x))
                                            (tr λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C x,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C y ⟧,
                                                F x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 y x f
                                                 yy)) -->[
                                                z] 
                                                F y yy
                                             ♯ F
                                               (pr12 
                                                (HD₁ y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)))) ;; 
                               HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp))

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy) ;; id_disp
                                (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                      D₁ HD₁) F y yy))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
           D₁ HD₁) F x xx) ;; (tr mor_disp (F x xx)
                                    (F y yy)
                               ♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           (HD₂
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C y)
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C x)
                                              ((# 
                                                (functor_identity
                                                 C))%cat
                                                 f)
                                              (F y yy))
                                           (id₁
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 C x))
                                           (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C x,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C y ⟧,
                                               F x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 y x f
                                                 yy)) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               F y yy
                                            ♯ F
                                              (pr12 
                                               (HD₁ y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy))) ;; 
                               HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp))

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy) ;; id_disp
                                (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                      D₁ HD₁) F y yy))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
   (id_disp
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
            D₁ HD₁) F x xx) ;; (♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                            (HD₂
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 C y)
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 C x)
                                               ((# 
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))%cat
                                                 f)
                                               (F y yy))
                                            (id₁
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 C x))
                                            (tr λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C x,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C y ⟧,
                                                F x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 y x f
                                                 yy)) -->[
                                                z] 
                                                F y yy
                                             ♯ F
                                               (pr12 
                                                (HD₁ y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy))) ;; 
                                HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp)))

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy) ;; id_disp
                                (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                      D₁ HD₁) F y yy))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          D₁ HD₁) F x xx) ;; (♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                          (HD₂
                                             (functor_identity
                                                C y)
                                             (functor_identity
                                                C x)
                                             ((# (functor_identity
                                                 C))%cat
                                                f)
                                             (F y yy))
                                          (id₁
                                             (functor_identity
                                                C x))
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C x,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C y ⟧,
                                              F x
                                                (pr1
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 y x f
                                                 yy)) -->[
                                              z] F y
                                                 yy
                                           ♯ F
                                             (pr12 
                                              (HD₁ y x
                                                 f yy))) ;; 
                              HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
   (id_right (# (functor_identity C) (id₁ x · f)))
   ((♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy))) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          D₁ HD₁) F x xx) ;; (♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                          (HD₂
                                             (functor_identity
                                                C y)
                                             (functor_identity
                                                C x)
                                             ((# (functor_identity
                                                 C))%cat
                                                f)
                                             (F y yy))
                                          (id₁
                                             (functor_identity
                                                C x))
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C x,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 C y ⟧,
                                              F x
                                                (pr1
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 y x f
                                                 yy)) -->[
                                              z] F y
                                                 yy
                                           ♯ F
                                             (pr12 
                                              (HD₁ y x
                                                 f yy))) ;; 
                              HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
   (id_right (# (functor_identity C) (id₁ x · f)))
   ((♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy))) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
   (id_left (id₁ x · id₁ x · f))
   (♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
                (HD₂ (functor_identity C y)
                   (functor_identity C x)
                   ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
                   (F y yy))
                (id₁ (functor_identity C x))
                (tr λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
                          functor_identity C y ⟧,
                    F x (pr1 (HD₁ y x f yy)) -->[
                    z] F y yy
                 ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy))) ;; HD₂ y x
                                                 f
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  (♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy))) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  (♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
               (HD₂ (functor_identity C y)
                  (functor_identity C x)
                  ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
                  (F y yy))
               (id₁ (functor_identity C x))
               (tr λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
                         functor_identity C y ⟧,
                   F x (pr1 (HD₁ y x f yy)) -->[
                   z] F y yy ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy))) ;; 
   HD₂ y x f (F y yy))%mor_disp))

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy)) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
              (HD₂ (functor_identity C y)
                 (functor_identity C x)
                 ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
                 (F y yy))
              (id₁ (functor_identity C x))
              (tr λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
                        functor_identity C y ⟧,
                  F x (pr1 (HD₁ y x f yy)) -->[
                  z] F y yy ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy))) ;; 
  HD₂ y x f (F y yy))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy)) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  (♯ F ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                (HD₂ (functor_identity C y)
                   (functor_identity C x)
                   ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
                   (F y yy))
                (id₁ (functor_identity C x))
                (tr λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
                          functor_identity C y ⟧,
                    F x (pr1 (HD₁ y x f yy)) -->[
                    z] F y yy
                 ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy))) ;; HD₂ y x
                                                 f
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp))

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy)) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation
               (HD₂ (functor_identity C y)
                  (functor_identity C x)
                  ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
                  (F y yy))
               (id₁ (functor_identity C x))
               (tr λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
                         functor_identity C y ⟧,
                   F x (pr1 (HD₁ y x f yy)) -->[
                   z] F y yy ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy))) ;; 
             HD₂ y x f (F y yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy)) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F ff ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
                      functor_identity C y ⟧,
                F x (pr1 (HD₁ y x f yy)) -->[
                z] F y yy ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy))))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy)) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  (♯ F ff ;; ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy)))%mor_disp))

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F)%mor_disp (ff ;; HD₁ y x f yy)) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F ff ;; ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
   (functor_comp (functor_identity C) (id₁ x) f)
   (♯ F ff ;; ♯ F (HD₁ y x f yy))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F ff ;; ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
  (♯ F ff ;; ♯ F (HD₁ y x f yy))%mor_disp)) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F ff ;; ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F ff ;; ♯ F (HD₁ y x f yy))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)
 (♯ F ff ;; ♯ F (pr12 (HD₁ y x f yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D₁ HD₁))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (id₁ x) f @
! id_right (# (functor_identity C) (id₁ x · f)) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (# (functor_identity C) (id₁ x · f)) f (id₁ y)
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
        x y f)) =
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof f) @
assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f @
! id_left (id₁ x · id₁ x · f) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
     (id_right (id₁ x))) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
     x y f) @
! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D₁
        HD₁) F)
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor
           (indexed_functor_to_pstrans
              (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
                 HD₁ HD₂ F))))
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D₂
        HD₂))

              (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
                 HD₁ HD₂ F))))

        HD₂))

(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor

                        HD₁ HD₂ F))))
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
               D₂ HD₂)), disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
D₁, D₂: disp_univalent_category C
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D₁
        HD₁) F)
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor
           (indexed_functor_to_pstrans
              (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
                 HD₁ HD₂ F))))
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D₂
        HD₂))
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural_data HD₁ HD₂ F).
    
C: univalent_category

F: cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor

                     (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
                        HD₁ HD₂ F))))
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
               D₂ HD₂)), disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural_data HD₁
     HD₂ F)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural_axioms HD₁ HD₂ F).
  Defined.

fib_slice_bicat C

    (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C) X,
id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C) X ⟧
C: univalent_category
∏ (X Y : fib_slice_bicat C)
(f : fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X · # (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f
   · ?η₁ Y)

    
C: univalent_category
∏ X : fib_slice_bicat C,
fib_slice_bicat C
⟦ comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
    (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C) X,
id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C) X ⟧
 exact (λ P, psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor
                    (pr1 P) (pr2 P)).
    
C: univalent_category
∏ (X Y : fib_slice_bicat C)
(f : fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ P : fib_slice_bicat C,
    psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor
      (pr1 P) (pr2 P)) X
   · # (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f
   · (λ P : fib_slice_bicat C,
      psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor
        (pr1 P) (pr2 P)) Y)
 
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
(λ P : fib_slice_bicat C,
 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor
   (pr1 P) (pr2 P)) P₁
· # (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) F ==>
# (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) F
· (λ P : fib_slice_bicat C,
   psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor
     (pr1 P) (pr2 P)) P₂

is_invertible_2cell ?η

P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
(λ P : fib_slice_bicat C,
 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor
   (pr1 P) (pr2 P)) P₁
· # (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) F ==>
# (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) F
· (λ P : fib_slice_bicat C,
   psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor
     (pr1 P) (pr2 P)) P₂
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural (pr2 P₁) (pr2 P₂) F).

  (comp_psfunctor

     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C) P₁) x
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) x)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_natural (pr2 P₁)
     (pr2 P₂) F x xx)

        apply id_is_z_iso_disp.
  Defined.

  (**
   4. The laws
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
is_pstrans psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data

  
C: univalent_category
is_pstrans psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data

    
C: univalent_category
∏ (X Y : fib_slice_bicat C)
(f g : fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X
 ◃ ## (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) α)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X Y g =
pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X Y f
• (##
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) α
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Y)
C: univalent_category
∏ X : fib_slice_bicat C,
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) X)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X)
 • linvunitor
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X))
• (psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) X
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X)
C: univalent_category
∏ (X Y Z : fib_slice_bicat C)
(f : fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) f
     g)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator
      (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X)
      (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) g)
    • (pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X Y f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) g))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f)
       (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f
     ◃ pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) g)
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f g
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Z)

    
C: univalent_category
∏ (X Y : fib_slice_bicat C)
(f g : fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X
 ◃ ## (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) α)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X Y g =
pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X Y f
• (##
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) α
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Y)
 
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁
 ◃ ## (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) τ)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₂ G =
pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₂ F
• (##
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) τ
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₂)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
∏ (x : C)
(xx : pr1
        ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                   (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
                   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
           P₁) x),
((pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁
  ◃ ## (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) τ)
 • pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₂ G) x
  xx =
(pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₂ F
 • (##
      (comp_psfunctor
         (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) τ
    ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₂)) x
  xx

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
((pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁
  ◃ ## (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) τ)
 • pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₂ G) x
  xx =
(pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₂ F
 • (##
      (comp_psfunctor
         (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) τ
    ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₂)) x
  xx

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; id_disp
              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                    (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) G x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx) ;; (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            F x xx -->[
                                            z] G x xx
                                         (tr mor_disp
                                               (F x xx)
                                               (pr2 P₂
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx))
                                          τ x xx ;; 
                                          cartesian_factorisation
                                            (pr2 P₂ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x xx))
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (transportb
                                               (λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                G x xx -->[
                                                z] 
                                                G x xx)
                                               (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                               (id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
                                         pr2 P₂ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (G x xx)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; id_disp
              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                    (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) G x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (G x xx)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
           (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx) ;; ((tr mor_disp
                                                (F x
                                                 xx)
                                                (pr2
                                                 P₂ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx))
                                           τ x xx ;; 
                                           cartesian_factorisation
                                             (pr2 P₂ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (G x
                                                 xx))
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (transportb
                                                (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 G x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 G x
                                                 xx)
                                                (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                                (id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
                                          pr2 P₂ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (G x xx)))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; id_disp
              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                    (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) G x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (G x xx)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
           (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx) ;; (tr mor_disp
                                               (F x xx)
                                               (G x xx)
                                          τ x xx ;; 
                                          cartesian_factorisation
                                            (pr2 P₂ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x xx))
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (transportb
                                               (λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                G x xx -->[
                                                z] 
                                                G x xx)
                                               (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                               (id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                          pr2 P₂ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (G x xx)))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; id_disp
              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
