                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                    (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) G x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (G x xx)
  (tr mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (G x xx)
   (id_disp
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
            (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx) ;; (τ x xx ;; 
                                           cartesian_factorisation
                                             (pr2 P₂ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (G x
                                                 xx))
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (transportb
                                                (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 G x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 G x
                                                 xx)
                                                (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                                (id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                           pr2 P₂ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (G x xx)))%mor_disp)))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; id_disp
              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                    (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) G x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx) ;; (τ x xx ;; 
                                         cartesian_factorisation
                                           (pr2 P₂ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (G x xx))
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (transportb
                                              (λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                               G x xx -->[
                                               z] 
                                               G x xx)
                                              (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                              (id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                         pr2 P₂ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (G x xx)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 transportb (mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (pr1 G x xx))
   (id_right (id₁ x)) (τ x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx) ;; (τ x xx ;; 
                                         cartesian_factorisation
                                           (pr2 P₂ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (G x xx))
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (transportb
                                              (λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                               G x xx -->[
                                               z] 
                                               G x xx)
                                              (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                              (id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                         pr2 P₂ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (G x xx)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 transportb (mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (pr1 G x xx))
   (id_right (id₁ x)) (τ x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 transportb (mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (G x xx))
   (id_left (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x))
   (τ x xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                (pr2 P₂ x x (id₁ x) (G x xx)) (id₁ x)
                (transportb
                   (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                    G x xx -->[ z] G x xx)
                   (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                      x) (id_disp (G x xx))) ;; pr2 P₂
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (pr1 G x xx) τ x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 F x xx) (G x xx)
  (τ x xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
               (pr2 P₂ x x (id₁ x) (G x xx)) (id₁ x)
               (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                   G x xx -->[ z] G x xx
                id_disp (G x xx)) ;; pr2 P₂ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (G x xx))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
              (pr2 P₂ x x (id₁ x) (G x xx)) (id₁ x)
              (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                  G x xx -->[ z] G x xx
               id_disp (G x xx)) ;; pr2 P₂ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (G x xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (G x xx)
  (τ x xx ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                (pr2 P₂ x x (id₁ x) (G x xx)) (id₁ x)
                (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                    G x xx -->[ z] G x xx
                 id_disp (G x xx)) ;; pr2 P₂ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (G x xx)))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; (cartesian_factorisation
               (pr2 P₂ x x (id₁ x) (G x xx)) (id₁ x)
               (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                   G x xx -->[ z] G x xx
                id_disp (G x xx)) ;; pr2 P₂ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (G x xx)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                G x xx -->[ z] G x xx id_disp (G x xx)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (G x xx)
  (τ x xx ;; id_disp (G x xx))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (τ x xx ;; id_disp (G x xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (G x xx))
   (id_right (id₁ x)) (τ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx
 (tr mor_disp (F x xx) (G x xx) τ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 F x xx -->[ z] G x xx τ x xx)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂: fib_slice_bicat C
F, G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
! id_right (id₁ x) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x =
! id_right (id₁ x) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
       x) @
assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x) @
! id_left (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x))) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
     x x (id₁ x)) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
∏ X : fib_slice_bicat C,
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) X)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X)
 • linvunitor
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X))
• (psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) X
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X)
 
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P
 ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) P)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P P (id₁ P) =
(runitor (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P)
 • linvunitor
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P))
• (psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) P
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
∏ (x : C)
(xx : pr1
        ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                   (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
                   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
           P) x),
((pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P
  ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) P)
 • pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P P
     (id₁ P)) x xx =
((runitor (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P)
  • linvunitor
      (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P))
 • (psfunctor_id
      (comp_psfunctor
         (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) P
    ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P)) x
  xx

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
((pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P
  ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) P)
 • pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P P
     (id₁ P)) x xx =
((runitor (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P)
  • linvunitor
      (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P))
 • (psfunctor_id
      (comp_psfunctor
         (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) P
    ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P)) x
  xx

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (id_disp xx ;; id_disp
                  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
                     (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
                      disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P)) x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
   id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx) ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                    xx -->[ z] xx
                                 (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                     xx -->[
                                     id₁ x] pr2 P x x
                                              z xx
                                  (tr mor_disp xx
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x
                                            · id₁ x)
                                           xx)
                                   (tr mor_disp xx
                                         (pr2 P x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr2 P x x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               xx))
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P x x
                                         (id₁ x) xx)
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (transportb
                                         (λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          xx -->[
                                          z] xx)
                                         (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                            x)
                                         (id_disp xx)) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P x x
                                            (id₁ x) xx))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P x x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               xx)
                                            (pr2 P x x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               xx)
                                       pr2 P x x
                                         (id₁ x) xx ;; 
                                       (tr mor_disp xx
                                             (pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                xx)
                                        id_disp xx ;; 
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx)
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (transportb
                                             (λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              xx -->[
                                              z] xx)
                                             (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                x)
                                             (id_disp
                                                xx))))) ;; 
                                   cartesian_factorisation
                                     (pr2 P x x
                                        (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                        xx) (id₁ x)
                                     (transportb
                                        (λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                         pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              xx) -->[
                                         z] xx)
                                        (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (id₁ x))
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              xx) ;; 
                                         pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x) xx)))) ;; 
                                 pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (id_disp xx ;; id_disp
                  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
                     (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
                      disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P)) x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
   id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx) ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                    xx -->[ z] xx
                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                      xx) (id₁ x)
                                   ((tr mor_disp xx
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x
                                              · id₁ x)
                                             xx)
                                     (tr mor_disp xx
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx))
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x) xx)
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (transportb
                                           (λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            xx -->[
                                            z] xx)
                                           (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                              x)
                                           (id_disp xx)) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              xx))
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr mor_disp
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                         pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x) xx ;; 
                                         (tr mor_disp
                                               xx
                                               (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                          id_disp xx ;; 
                                          cartesian_factorisation
                                            (pr2 P x x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               xx)
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (transportb
                                               (λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                xx -->[
                                                z] xx)
                                               (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                               (id_disp
                                                 xx))))) ;; 
                                     cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x
                                           · id₁ x) xx)
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (transportb
                                          (λ z : C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                           pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                xx) -->[
                                           z] xx)
                                          (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (id₁ x))
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                xx) ;; 
                                           pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx))) ;; 
                                    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x
                                              ⟧,
                                        pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x
                                           · id₁ x) xx -->[
                                        z] xx
                                     pr2 P x x
                                       (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                       xx)) ;; pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (id_disp xx ;; id_disp
                  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
                     (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
                      disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P)) x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
   id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx) ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                    xx -->[ z] xx
                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                      xx) (id₁ x)
                                   ((tr mor_disp xx
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x
                                              · id₁ x)
                                             xx)
                                     (tr mor_disp xx
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx))
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x) xx)
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            xx -->[
                                            z] xx
                                         id_disp xx) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              xx))
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr mor_disp
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                         pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x) xx ;; 
                                         (tr mor_disp
                                               xx
                                               (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                          id_disp xx ;; 
                                          cartesian_factorisation
                                            (pr2 P x x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               xx)
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (tr λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                xx -->[
                                                z] xx
                                             id_disp
                                               xx)))) ;; 
                                     cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x
                                           · id₁ x) xx)
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr λ z : C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                           pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                xx) -->[
                                           z] xx
                                        pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx) ;; 
                                        pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x) xx)) ;; 
                                    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x
                                              ⟧,
                                        pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x
                                           · id₁ x) xx -->[
                                        z] xx
                                     pr2 P x x
                                       (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                       xx)) ;; pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (id_disp xx ;; id_disp
                  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
                     (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
                      disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P)) x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
    id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                       xx) (id₁ x)
                                    (tr mor_disp xx xx
                                     (tr mor_disp xx
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x
                                               · id₁ x)
                                              xx)
                                      (tr mor_disp xx
                                            (pr2 P x x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx))
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P x x
                                            (id₁ x) xx)
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                             xx -->[
                                             z] xx
                                          id_disp xx) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr2 P x x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               xx))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr mor_disp
                                               (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                               (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                          (tr mor_disp
                                                (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                                (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                           pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx ;; 
                                           (id_disp xx ;; 
                                            cartesian_factorisation
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (tr 
                                               λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                               xx -->[
                                               z] xx
                                               id_disp
                                                 xx))))) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x
                                            · id₁ x)
                                           xx) (id₁ x)
                                        (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) -->[
                                            z] xx
                                         pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              xx) ;; 
                                         pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x) xx)) ;; 
                                     pr2 P x x
                                       (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                       xx) ;; pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                xx))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (id_disp xx ;; id_disp
                  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
                     (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
                      disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P)) x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  (tr mor_disp xx xx
   (id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                      xx) (id₁ x)
                                   (tr mor_disp xx xx
                                    (tr mor_disp xx xx
                                     (tr mor_disp xx
                                           xx
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x) xx)
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            xx -->[
                                            z] xx
                                         id_disp xx) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              xx))
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr mor_disp
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                         (tr mor_disp
                                               (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                               (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                          pr2 P x x
                                            (id₁ x) xx ;; 
                                          (id_disp xx ;; 
                                           cartesian_factorisation
                                             (pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                xx)
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (tr λ 
                                                 z : ...,
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                              id_disp
                                                xx)))) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x
                                            · id₁ x)
                                           xx) (id₁ x)
                                        (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) -->[
                                            z] xx
                                         pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              xx) ;; 
                                         pr2 P x x
                                           (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                                      pr2 P x x
                                        (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                        xx))) ;; pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx))%mor_disp)))

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (id_disp xx ;; id_disp
                  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
                     (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
                      disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
                        (pr1 P)) x xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                 (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                                 (id₁ x)
                                 (tr mor_disp xx xx
                                  cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                       xx) (id₁ x)
                                    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x
                                              ⟧,
                                        xx -->[ z] xx
                                     id_disp xx) ;; 
                                  cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                       (pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x) xx))
                                    (id₁ x)
                                    (tr mor_disp
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx)
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx)
                                     pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                       xx ;; (id_disp
                                                xx ;; 
                                              cartesian_factorisation
                                                (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                                 id_disp
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                  cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P x x
                                       (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                       xx) (id₁ x)
                                    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x
                                              ⟧,
                                        pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx) -->[
                                        z] xx
                                     pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                       (pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                                     pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                       xx) ;; pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                xx) ;; 
                               pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (id_left (id₁ x))
   (id_disp
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
            (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
         (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
          disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
            (pr1 P)) x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (id_left (id₁ x))
    (id_disp xx) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
                       (tr mor_disp xx xx
                        cartesian_factorisation
                          (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                          (id₁ x)
                          (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                              xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
                        cartesian_factorisation
                          (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
                          (id₁ x)
                          (tr mor_disp
                                (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                                (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                           pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; 
                           transportb
                             (mor_disp xx
                                (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
                             (id_left (id₁ x))
                             (cartesian_factorisation
                                (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                                (id₁ x)
                                (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                    xx -->[ z] xx
                                 id_disp xx))) ;; 
                        cartesian_factorisation
                          (pr2 P x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                             xx) (id₁ x)
                          (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                              pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) -->[
                              z] xx
                           pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                           pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                        pr2 P x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                     pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
       (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
        disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
          (pr1 P)) x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 ((tr mor_disp xx xx id_disp xx) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x) xx)
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr mor_disp xx
                                             xx
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx)
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              xx -->[
                                              z] xx
                                           id_disp xx) ;; 
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                xx))
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (tr mor_disp
                                                (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                                (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                           pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx ;; 
                                           (tr mor_disp
                                                 xx
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                            cartesian_factorisation
                                              (pr2 P x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (tr 
                                               λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                               xx -->[
                                               z] xx
                                               id_disp
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x
                                              · id₁ x)
                                             xx)
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) -->[
                                              z] xx
                                           pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr2 P x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                xx) ;; 
                                           pr2 P x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             xx) ;; 
                                        pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x
                                           · id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                                     pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                       xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
       (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
        disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
          (pr1 P)) x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  (id_disp xx ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                    (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
                    (tr mor_disp xx xx
                     cartesian_factorisation
                       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
                       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                           xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
                     cartesian_factorisation
                       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                          (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
                       (id₁ x)
                       (tr mor_disp
                             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                        pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 xx
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                                 id_disp
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                     cartesian_factorisation
                       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx)
                       (id₁ x)
                       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                           pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) -->[
                           z] xx
                        pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                          (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                        pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                  pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
       (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
        disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
          (pr1 P)) x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  (id_disp xx ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                    (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
                    (tr mor_disp xx xx
                     cartesian_factorisation
                       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
                       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                           xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
                     cartesian_factorisation
                       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                          (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
                       (id₁ x)
                       (tr mor_disp
                             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                        (tr mor_disp
                              (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                              (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                         pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                                 id_disp
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                     cartesian_factorisation
                       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx)
                       (id₁ x)
                       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                           pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) -->[
                           z] xx
                        pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                          (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                        pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                  pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
         (pr1 P)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (id_disp xx ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                   (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
                   (tr mor_disp xx xx
                    cartesian_factorisation
                      (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                          xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
                    cartesian_factorisation
                      (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                         (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
                      (id₁ x)
                      (tr mor_disp
                            (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                            (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                       pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                                 id_disp
                                                 xx)) ;; 
                    cartesian_factorisation
                      (pr2 P x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx)
                      (id₁ x)
                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                          pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                            (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) -->[
                          z] xx
                       pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                         (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
                       pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                 pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
         (pr1 P)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (id_left (id₁ x · id₁ x))
   (cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
      (id₁ x)
      (tr mor_disp xx xx
       cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
         (id₁ x)
         (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
          id_disp xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                           (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                              (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
                           (id₁ x)
                           (tr mor_disp
                                 (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                                 (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                            pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; 
                            cartesian_factorisation
                              (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                              (id₁ x)
                              (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                  xx -->[ z] xx
                               id_disp xx)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 xx)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) ;; 
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) ;; 
       pr2 P x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx) ;; pr2 P x x
                                          (id₁ x) xx)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
         (pr1 P)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  (cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp xx xx
      cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
        (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
        (id₁ x)
        (tr mor_disp (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
              (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
         pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                      xx) (id₁ x)
                                   (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x
                                             ⟧,
                                       xx -->[ z] xx
                                    id_disp xx)) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) -->[
            z] xx
         pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
         pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; pr2 P x x
                                    (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx) ;; 
   pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
         (pr1 P)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
    (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp xx xx
     cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
       (id₁ x)

     cartesian_factorisation
       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
       (id₁ x)
       (tr mor_disp (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
             (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
        pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                  (pr2 P x x (id₁ x)
                                     xx) (id₁ x)
                                  (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                      xx -->[ z] xx
                                   id_disp xx)) ;; 
     cartesian_factorisation
       (pr2 P x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) -->[
           z] xx
        pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; 
        pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; pr2 P x x
                                   (id₁ x · id₁ x) xx) ;; 
  pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)%mor_disp)

 (cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
    (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
           (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
      pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                                (id₁ x)
                                (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                    xx -->[ z] xx
                                 id_disp xx)) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 xx)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) ;; 
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) ;; 
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 xx)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
         (pr1 P)) x xx))

 (cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
    (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
     (id₁ x)

                                (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                                (id₁ x)

                                    xx -->[ z] xx

                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C

                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x

                                                 x)

                                                 z] xx

                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2

                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) ;; 
                                                 pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor

xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor

(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr mor_disp xx xx
  (cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   (cartesian_factorisation
      (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
      (id₁ x)

                                 (id₁ x)

                                     xx -->[ z] xx
                                  id_disp xx)) ;; 
    (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) ;; pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx)))%mor_disp)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
         (pr1 P)) x xx))

(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,

xx: pr1

     P) x
(cartesian_factorisation
   (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)) (id₁ x)
   (tr mor_disp (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
         (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)

                                                 x x
