                                                 x) xx))%mor_disp =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx) xx)
  (assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
           (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
      pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
                                (id₁ x)
                                (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                    xx -->[ z] xx
                                 id_disp xx)) ;; pr2 P
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x) xx) ;; 
   pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)%mor_disp = ?t2

 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)) (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)

P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (cartesian_factorisation (pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)
    (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  pr2 P x x (id₁ x) xx)%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
         (pr1 P)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
         (pr1 P)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor

     P) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P) (pr2 P))
      (disp_functor_identity (pr1 P),,
       disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor

C: univalent_category
P: fib_slice_bicat C
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P) x
! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof x @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (! id_right (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
          x)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x)
     (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (! id_left (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (id_right (id₁ x)) @
      id_right (id₁ x) @ ! id_left (id₁ x)) @
   ! assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) @
(assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · (id₁ x · id₁ x)) @
 assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) @
 cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
   (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
   (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
      (id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x))) @
 cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
   (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x)) @
 maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
   (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
! id_left (id₁ x · id₁ x) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x) (! id_left (id₁ x)) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
     x x (id₁ x)) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x =
! id_left (id₁ x) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
∏ (X Y Z : fib_slice_bicat C)
(f : fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) f
     g)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator
      (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X)
      (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) g)
    • (pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data X Y f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) g))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f)
       (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f
     ◃ pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) g)
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) f g
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data Z)
 
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) F
     G)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₃
    (F · G) =
((((lassociator
      (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁)
      (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) F)
      (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) G)
    • (pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₂
         F ▹ # (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) G))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) F)
       (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₂)
       (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) G))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) F
     ◃ pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₂ P₃
         G))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) F)
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) G)
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₃))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) F G
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₃)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
∏ (x : C)
(xx : pr1
        ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                   (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
                   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
           P₁) x),
((pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁
  ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C))
      F G)
 • pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₃
     (F · G)) x xx =
(((((lassociator
       (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁)
       (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) F)

        (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) G))
   • (# (comp_psfunctor

      ◃ pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₂ P₃
          G))
  • lassociator
      (# (comp_psfunctor
            (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) F)
      (# (comp_psfunctor
            (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) G)
      (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₃))
 • (psfunctor_comp
      (comp_psfunctor
         (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)) F G
    ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₃)) x
  xx

x: C

  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
((pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁
  ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C))
      F G)
 • pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁ P₃
     (F · G)) x xx =
(((((lassociator
       (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₁)
       (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) F)
       (# (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C)) G)

        (# (comp_psfunctor
              (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)

        (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data P₂)

C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                            (pr1 P₁)
                                            (pr2 P₁))
                                         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                            (pr1 F)
                                            (pr1 G),,
                                          disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
                                            (pr2 F)
                                            (pr2 G)) x
                                         xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
       pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (F x xx)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (F x xx)
      id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 G)
                                          (id_disp
                                             (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                                (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                                 (pr1
                                                 P₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₁))
                                                F x xx))) ;; 
     id_disp (pr1 G x (F x xx))) ;; id_disp
                                      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                            (pr1 P₂)
                                            (pr2 P₂))
                                         G x (F x xx))) ;; 
   id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                  G x (F x xx) -->[
                                  z] pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx)
                               (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                   G x (F x xx) -->[
                                   id₁ x] pr2 P₃ x x z
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))
                                (tr mor_disp
                                      (G x (F x xx))
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x
                                          · id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))
                                 (tr mor_disp
                                       (G x (F x xx))
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                  cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (G x (F x xx)))
                                    (id₁ x)
                                    (transportb
                                       (λ z : C ⟦ x, x
                                              ⟧,
                                        G x (F x xx) -->[
                                        z] G x
                                             (F x xx))
                                       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                          x)
                                       (id_disp
                                          (G x
                                             (F x xx)))) ;; 
                                  cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx))))
                                    (id₁ x)
                                    (tr mor_disp
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (G x
                                                (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                     pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                     (tr mor_disp
                                           (G x
                                              (F x xx))
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                      id_disp
                                        (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (transportb
                                           (λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                            z] pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))
                                           (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                              x)
                                           (id_disp
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))))) ;; 
                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P₃ x x
                                      (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                      (pr1 G x
                                         (pr1 F x xx)))
                                   (id₁ x)
                                   (transportb
                                      (λ z : C ⟦ x, x
                                             ⟧,
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))) -->[
                                       z] pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx))
                                      (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (id₁ x))
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))) ;; 
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))))) ;; 
                               pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                            (pr1 P₁)
                                            (pr2 P₁))
                                         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                            (pr1 F)
                                            (pr1 G),,
                                          disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
                                            (pr2 F)
                                            (pr2 G)) x
                                         xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
       pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (F x xx)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (F x xx)
      id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 G)
                                          (id_disp
                                             (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                                (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                                 (pr1
                                                 P₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₁))
                                                F x xx))) ;; 
     id_disp (pr1 G x (F x xx))) ;; id_disp
                                      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                            (pr1 P₂)
                                            (pr2 P₂))
                                         G x (F x xx))) ;; 
   id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                  G x (F x xx) -->[
                                  z] pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx)
                               cartesian_factorisation
                                 (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx)))
                                 (id₁ x)
                                 ((tr mor_disp
                                        (G x (F x xx))
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x
                                            · id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                   (tr mor_disp
                                         (G x (F x xx))
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (transportb
                                         (λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          G x (F x xx) -->[
                                          z] G x
                                               (F x xx))
                                         (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                            x)
                                         (id_disp
                                            (G x
                                               (F x xx)))) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       (tr mor_disp
                                             (G x
                                                (F x
                                                 xx))
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        id_disp
                                          (G x
                                             (F x xx)) ;; 
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (transportb
                                             (λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                              z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))
                                             (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                x)
                                             (id_disp
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))))) ;; 
                                   cartesian_factorisation
                                     (pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx)))
                                     (id₁ x)
                                     (transportb
                                        (λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                         pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) -->[
                                         z] pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))
                                        (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (id₁ x))
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                         pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))))) ;; 
                                  (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx)) -->[
                                      z] pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx)
                                   pr2 P₃ x x
                                     (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx)))) ;; 
                               pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                            (pr1 P₁)
                                            (pr2 P₁))
                                         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                            (pr1 F)
                                            (pr1 G),,
                                          disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
                                            (pr2 F)
                                            (pr2 G)) x
                                         xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
       pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (F x xx)
      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
          pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[
          z] pr1 G x (F x xx)
       id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 G)
                                           (id_disp
                                              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                                 (pr1
                                                 P₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₁))
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
      id_disp (pr1 G x (F x xx))) ;; id_disp
                                       (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                             (pr1 P₂)
                                             (pr2 P₂))
                                          G x (F x xx))) ;; 
    id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                  (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx)))
                                  (id₁ x)
                                  (tr mor_disp
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx))
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx))
                                   (tr mor_disp
                                         (G x (F x xx))
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x
                                             · id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                    (tr mor_disp
                                          (G x
                                             (F x xx))
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                     cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (G x
                                             (F x xx)))
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (transportb
                                          (λ z : C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                           G x
                                             (F x xx) -->[
                                           z] G x
                                                (F x
                                                 xx))
                                          (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                             x)
                                          (id_disp
                                             (G x
                                                (F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
                                     cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr mor_disp
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        (tr mor_disp
                                              (pr2 P₃
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                              (pr2 P₃
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                         pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (G x
                                              (F x xx)) ;; 
                                         (id_disp
                                            (G x
                                               (F x xx)) ;; 
                                          cartesian_factorisation
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (transportb
                                               (λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                pr1 G
                                                 x ... -->[
                                                z] 
                                                pr1 G
                                                 x ...)
                                               (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                               (id_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 ...))))))) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x
                                          · id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (transportb
                                         (λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) -->[
                                          z] pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))
                                         (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (id₁ x))
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                          pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))) ;; 
                                   pr2 P₃ x x
                                     (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                                pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                  (pr1 G x
                                     (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                            (pr1 P₁)
                                            (pr2 P₁))
                                         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                            (pr1 F)
                                            (pr1 G),,
                                          disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
                                            (pr2 F)
                                            (pr2 G)) x
                                         xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
   (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
         (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
    (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
          (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
     (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      (id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 G)
                                           (id_disp
                                              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                                 (pr1
                                                 P₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₁))
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
       id_disp (pr1 G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                       (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                             (pr1 P₂)
                                             (pr2 P₂))
                                          G x (F x xx)) ;; 
       id_disp (G x (F x xx)) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx)))
                                    (id₁ x)
                                    (tr mor_disp
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx))
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx))
                                     (tr mor_disp
                                           (G x
                                              (F x xx))
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (G x
                                               (F x xx))
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (G x ...))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (transportb
                                            (λ ...,
                                             ...)
                                            (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                               x)
                                            (id_disp
                                               ...)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x ...
                                               ...))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr mor_disp
                                               (...)
                                               (...)
                                          (tr ...
                                           ... ;; ...)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (... · ...)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               ...))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (transportb
                                            (λ ...,
                                             ...)
                                            (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                               ... ...)
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x ...
                                               ... ;; 
                                             pr2 P₃ x
                                               x ...
                                               ...)) ;; 
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x
                                          · id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx))))) ;; 
                                  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp))))))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                            (pr1 P₁)
                                            (pr2 P₁))
                                         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                            (pr1 F)
                                            (pr1 G),,
                                          disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
                                            (pr2 F)
                                            (pr2 G)) x
                                         xx))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (id_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 G)
                                      (id_disp
                                         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                               (pr1 P₁)
                                               (pr2 P₁))
                                            F x xx)) ;; 
  id_disp (pr1 G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                                        (pr1 P₂)
                                        (pr2 P₂)) G x
                                     (F x xx)) ;; 
  id_disp (G x (F x xx)) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                               (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                  (pr1 G x
                                     (pr1 F x xx)))
                               (id₁ x)
                               (tr mor_disp
                                     (G x (F x xx))
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))
                                cartesian_factorisation
                                  (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (G x (F x xx)))
                                  (id₁ x)
                                  (transportb
                                     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                      G x (F x xx) -->[
                                      z] G x (F x xx))
                                     (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                        x)
                                     (id_disp
                                        (G x (F x xx)))) ;; 
                                cartesian_factorisation
                                  (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx))))
                                  (id₁ x)
                                  (tr mor_disp
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (G x
                                              (F x xx)))
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                   pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                   (id_disp
                                      (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (transportb
                                         (λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx) -->[
                                          z] pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))
                                         (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                            x)
                                         (id_disp
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))))) ;; 
                                cartesian_factorisation
                                  (pr2 P₃ x x
                                     (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx)))
                                  (id₁ x)
                                  (transportb
                                     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))) -->[
                                      z] pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx))
                                     (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (id₁ x))
                                     (pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx)))) ;; 
                                pr2 P₃ x x
                                  (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                  (pr1 G x
                                     (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                             pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                               (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 transportb
   (mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id_left (id₁ x))
   (id_disp
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
            (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F)
            (pr1 G),,
          disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
            (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (transportb
    (mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (F x xx))) (id_left (id₁ x))
    (♯ (pr1 G)
       (id_disp
          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))) ;; id_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₂) (pr2 P₂)) G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (transportb
           (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx))
           (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
              x) (id_disp (G x (F x xx)))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
                                                 transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx))
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x))
                                                 (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))
                                                 (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                                                 x)
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))))) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (transportb
           (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
           (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
              (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
       (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
        disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
          (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 ((tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
        (pr1 G x (F x xx))
   ♯ (pr1 G)
     (id_disp
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
              (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))) ;; id_disp
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₂) (pr2 P₂)) G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       (tr mor_disp
                                             (G x
                                                (F x
                                                 xx))
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                              z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                           id_disp
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
       (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
        disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
          (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 ((tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
        (pr1 G x (F x xx))
   ♯ (pr1 G)
     (id_disp
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
              (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))) ;; id_disp
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₂) (pr2 P₂)) G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       (tr mor_disp
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (G x
                                             (F x xx)) ;; 
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                              z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                           id_disp
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
       (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
        disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
          (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  (♯ (pr1 G)
     (id_disp
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
              (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
   id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
           (pr1 P₂) (pr2 P₂)) G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
   (cartesian_factorisation
      (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
      (id₁ x)
      (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
            (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       cartesian_factorisation
         (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
         (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
             G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
          id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr mor_disp
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
