                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        (tr mor_disp
                                              (pr2 P₃
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                              (pr2 P₃
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                         pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (G x
                                              (F x xx)) ;; 
                                         cartesian_factorisation
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                               pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                            id_disp
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))) ;; 
       cartesian_factorisation
         (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
            (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
         (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
             pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
               (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                  (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
             z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
          pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
            (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
          pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
       pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
         (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (pr1 G x
                                         (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (♯ (pr1 G)
    (id_disp
       (disp_functor_over_id_composite
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
             (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₂) (pr2 P₂)) G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                             pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                             z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                          id_disp
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (transportb
    (mor_disp
       (pr1 G x
          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))
       (pr1 G x
          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx)))
    (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
    (id_disp
       (pr1 G x
          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))) ;; id_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  id_disp
    (disp_functor_over_id_composite
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
          (pr1 P₂) (pr2 P₂)) G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                             pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                             z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                          id_disp
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (transportb
    (mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) (G x (F x xx)))
    (id_right (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x))
    (transportb
       (mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
          (pr1 G x (F x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x · id₁ x))
       (transportb
          (mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
             (pr1 G x (F x xx))) (id_right (id₁ x))
          (transportb
             (mor_disp
                (pr1 G x
                   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))
                (pr1 G x
                   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx)))
             (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
             (id_disp
                (pr1 G x
                   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx)))))) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                             pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                             z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                          id_disp
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 ((tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)) (G x (F x xx))
   (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
         (pr1 G x (F x xx))
    (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
          (pr1 G x (F x xx))
     (tr mor_disp
           (pr1 G x
              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                    (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))
           (pr1 G x
              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                 (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                    (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))
      id_disp
        (pr1 G x
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                 (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx)))))) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                             pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                             z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                          id_disp
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
   (tr mor_disp (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
         (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
    (tr mor_disp
          (pr1 G x
             (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                   (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))
          (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
     (id_disp
        (pr1 G x
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                 (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx)) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)
                                                 id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                                 id_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (...))) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))%mor_disp)))))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (id_disp
    (pr1 G x
       (disp_functor_over_id_composite
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
             (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx)) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                               (pr2 P₃
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (tr 
                                                mor_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))
                                                cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)
                                                 id_disp
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                                cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                                 id_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
                                                cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 P₃ x
                                                 x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                                pr2 P₃
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                             pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (pr1 G x
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
               (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))
      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
   (id_left (id₁ x · id₁ x))
   (cartesian_factorisation
      (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
      (id₁ x)
      (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
            (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
       cartesian_factorisation
         (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
         (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
             G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
          id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr mor_disp
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (G x
                                             (F x xx)) ;; 
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                              z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                           id_disp
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
       cartesian_factorisation
         (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
            (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
         (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
             pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
               (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                  (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
             z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
          pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
            (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
          pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
       pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
         (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (pr1 G x
                                         (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp
       (pr1 G x
          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁)) F x xx))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                             pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                             z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                          id_disp
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
    (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
     cartesian_factorisation
       (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
        id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                     (id₁ x)
                                     (tr mor_disp
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                            z] pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                         id_disp
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
     cartesian_factorisation
       (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
          (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
             (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
           z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
        pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
          (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
        pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
     pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
    (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
     cartesian_factorisation
       (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
        id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                     (id₁ x)
                                     (tr mor_disp
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                            z] pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                         id_disp
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
     cartesian_factorisation
       (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
          (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
             (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
           z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
        pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
          (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
        pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
     pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
    (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                             pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                             z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                          id_disp
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
      (cartesian_factorisation
         (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
            (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
         (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
             pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
               (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                  (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
             z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
          pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
            (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
          pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
       pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
         (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
    (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
     cartesian_factorisation
       (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
        id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))))
                                     (id₁ x)
                                     (tr mor_disp
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                      cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                            z] pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                         id_disp
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
              (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                 (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) -->[
            z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
         pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (pr1 G x
                                         (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
    (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
     (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx))
           (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
      cartesian_factorisation
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
        (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
         id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr mor_disp
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (G x
                                             (F x xx)) ;; 
                                        cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                              z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                           id_disp
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
                                     (cartesian_factorisation
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x
                                            · id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (tr λ z : 
                                               C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                            pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr2 P₃
                                                 x x
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) -->[
                                            z] pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                         pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
