                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                         pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx)))))) ;; 
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
    (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
     cartesian_factorisation
       (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
        id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr mor_disp
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (G x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                       pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                       cartesian_factorisation
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (tr λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                             pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                             z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                          id_disp
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
                                    (cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x
                                           · id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx)))
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr λ z : C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                           pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) -->[
                                           z] pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)
                                        pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))) ;; 
                                        pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx))) ;; 
                                     pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                       (pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx))))) ;; 
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
      id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx))))
                                    (id₁ x)
                                    (tr mor_disp
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (G x
                                                (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                     pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                     cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx)))
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr λ z : C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                           pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx) -->[
                                           z] pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)
                                        id_disp
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx)))) ;; 
                                  (cartesian_factorisation
                                     (pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx)))
                                     (id₁ x)
                                     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                               x ⟧,
                                         pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx))) -->[
                                         z] pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx)
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr2 P₃ x x
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (pr1 G x
                                              (pr1 F x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                      pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                                   pr2 P₃ x x
                                     (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx)))))%mor_disp)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
     id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx))))
                                   (id₁ x)
                                   (tr mor_disp
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (G x
                                               (F x xx)))
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                    pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx) -->[
                                          z] pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)
                                       id_disp
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))) ;; 
                                 (cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                       (pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx)))
                                    (id₁ x)
                                    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x
                                              ⟧,
                                        pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))) -->[
                                        z] pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx)
                                     pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx))) ;; 
                                     pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                                  pr2 P₃ x x
                                    (id₁ x · id₁ x)
                                    (pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx)))))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
     id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx))))
                                   (id₁ x)
                                   (tr mor_disp
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (G x
                                               (F x xx)))
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                    pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx) -->[
                                          z] pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)
                                       id_disp
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))) ;; 
                                 (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                                     pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx))) -->[
                                     z] pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx)
                                  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                                  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx)))))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
      id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx))))
                                    (id₁ x)
                                    (tr mor_disp
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (G x
                                                (F x
                                                 xx)))
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                     pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                     cartesian_factorisation
                                       (pr2 P₃ x x
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx)))
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (tr λ z : C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                           pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx) -->[
                                           z] pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)
                                        id_disp
                                          (pr1 G x
                                             (pr1 F x
                                                xx)))) ;; 
                                  (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr2 P₃ x x
                                        (id₁ x)
                                        (pr1 G x
                                           (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                                   pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                     (pr1 G x
                                        (pr1 F x xx)))))%mor_disp)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
     id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx))))
                                   (id₁ x)
                                   (tr mor_disp
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (G x
                                               (F x xx)))
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                    pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx) -->[
                                          z] pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)
                                       id_disp
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))) ;; 
                                 (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                                  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx)))))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
     id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx))))
                                   (id₁ x)
                                   (tr mor_disp
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (G x
                                               (F x xx)))
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                    pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx) -->[
                                          z] pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)
                                       id_disp
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))) ;; 
                                 (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                                  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx)))))%mor_disp) =
?b
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
?b =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
     id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                   (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx))))
                                   (id₁ x)
                                   (tr mor_disp
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (G x
                                               (F x xx)))
                                         (pr2 P₃ x x
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                    pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                      (G x (F x xx)) ;; 
                                    cartesian_factorisation
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))
                                      (id₁ x)
                                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx) -->[
                                          z] pr1 G x
                                               (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)
                                       id_disp
                                         (pr1 G x
                                            (pr1 F x
                                               xx)))) ;; 
                                 (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr2 P₃ x x
                                       (id₁ x)
                                       (pr1 G x
                                          (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
                                  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                    (pr1 G x
                                       (pr1 F x xx)))))%mor_disp) =
?b

        
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(cartesian_factorisation
   (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
      (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))))
   (id₁ x)
   (tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
         (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
    pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           (pr2 P₃ x x
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                           (id₁ x)
                                           (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                               pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                            id_disp
                                              (pr1 G x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
 (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))))%mor_disp =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
     (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
  (assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
           (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
      pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                             (pr2 P₃ x
                                                x
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (tr λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                              id_disp
                                                (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
   pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
   pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
       (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))))
    (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
          (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
     pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                            (pr2 P₃ x
                                               x
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (tr λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                z] 
                                                pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                             id_disp
                                               (pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) ;; 
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C

x: C

     P₁) x
(tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
 ((tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
        (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))
   pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                          (pr2 P₃ x x
                                             (id₁ x)
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))
                                          (id₁ x)
                                          (tr λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx) -->[
                                              z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                           id_disp
                                             (pr1 G x
                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx)))) ;; 
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp) =
?t2

      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))

                                                 x xx) -->[
                                              z] pr1 G
                                                 x
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F x
                                                 xx)
                                           id_disp

                                                (pr1 F
                                                 x xx))) ;; 
   pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)))%mor_disp)) =
?t2

 (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                         (pr1 G x

C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
 transportb
   (mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))) (id_right (id₁ x))
   (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
 (tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
       (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr mor_disp (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx)))
      (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
 pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
     id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; (tr mor_disp
                                      (pr2 P₃ x x
                                         (id₁ x)
                                         (G x (F x xx)))
                                      (pr1 G x
                                         (pr1 F x xx))
                                 pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                   (G x (F x xx))))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr mor_disp (G x (F x xx)) (pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
      id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                   (G x (F x xx)))%mor_disp)) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (cartesian_factorisation
    (pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x) (G x (F x xx))) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
     id_disp (G x (F x xx))) ;; pr2 P₃ x x (id₁ x)
                                  (G x (F x xx)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
     G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
  id_disp (G x (F x xx)))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    G x (F x xx) -->[ z] G x (F x xx)
 id_disp (G x (F x xx))) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx) -->[ z] pr1 G x (pr1 F x xx)
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
         (pr1 P₁) (pr2 P₁))
      (disp_functor_over_id_composite (pr1 F) (pr1 G),,
       disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
         (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
P₁, P₂, P₃: fib_slice_bicat C
F: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
G: fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ P₂, P₃ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1
  ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)))
     P₁) x
! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof x @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (! id_right (id₁ x) @
   maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
          x) @
   assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x)
     (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (! id_left (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (id_right (id₁ x)) @
      id_right (id₁ x) @ ! id_left (id₁ x)) @
   ! assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) @
(assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · (id₁ x · id₁ x)) @
 assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) @
 cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
   (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
   (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
      (id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x))) @
 cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
   (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x)) @
 maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
   (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
! id_left (id₁ x · id₁ x) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ (functor_identity C x))
  (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x) (! id_right (id₁ x)) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (! id_right (id₁ x · id₁ x)) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (! id_right (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
     (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
        (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x)
           (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (! id_left (id₁ x))))) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
     (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
        (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x)
           (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x)))) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
     (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
        (id₁ x)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (id₁ x)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
     x x (id₁ x)) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x =
! id_left (id₁ x) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x

      apply homset_property.
      Opaque comp_psfunctor.
  Qed.
  Transparent comp_psfunctor.

  (**
   5. The unit
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C))
  (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C))

  
C: univalent_category
pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C))
  (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C))

    
C: univalent_category
pstrans_data
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C))
  (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C))
C: univalent_category
is_pstrans ?η

    
C: univalent_category
pstrans_data
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C))
  (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C))
 exact psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data.
    
C: univalent_category
is_pstrans psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_data
 exact is_pstrans_psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit.
  Defined.

  (**
   6. The action on objects forms an equivalence
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ x : C,
D x
→ indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
       (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
          (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))
    (functor_identity C x)
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
         D x
         → indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                   (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))
             (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[ # (functor_identity C) f] Fob y yy)
  ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ x : C,
D x
→ indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
       (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
          (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))
    (functor_identity C x)
 exact (λ x xx, xx).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
         D x
         → indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                   (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))
             (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[ # (functor_identity C) f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : C) (xx : D x), xx)
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy → xx -->[ id₁ x] HD y x f yy

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
f = id₁ x · f

      abstract
        (exact (!(id_left _))).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
     D HD)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
     D HD)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
(♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
      D HD))%mor_disp (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD x xx)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD x xx))
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : pr1 D y) (zz : pr1 D z)
(f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
(♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
      D HD))%mor_disp (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD x xx)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD) ff ;; ♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
                         D HD) gg)%mor_disp

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
(♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
      D HD))%mor_disp (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD x xx)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
  (id_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD x xx))
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) =
cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
  (transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
     (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
        x) (id_disp xx))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
     x) (id_disp xx)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) =
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data_subproof
  x x (id₁ x) =
! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof x

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : pr1 D y) (zz : pr1 D z)
(f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
(♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
      D HD))%mor_disp (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD x xx)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
        D HD) ff ;; ♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
                         D HD) gg)%mor_disp
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
  (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
   (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx (HD z x (f · g) zz)
 ((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x f (HD z y g zz))
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] zz
                                                 gg))) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
    (transportb
       (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧,
        HD y x f (HD z y g zz) -->[ z0] zz)
       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          g f) (HD y x f (HD z y g zz) ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
  (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
   (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx (HD z x (f · g) zz)
 (tr mor_disp xx (HD z x (f · g) zz)
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] zz
                                                 gg)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧,
         HD y x f (HD z y g zz) -->[ z0] zz)
        (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
           g f)
        (HD y x f (HD z y g zz) ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
  (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
   (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx (HD z x (f · g) zz)
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] zz
                                                 gg)) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
    (transportb
       (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧,
        HD y x f (HD z y g zz) -->[ z0] zz)
       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          g f) (HD y x f (HD z y g zz) ;; HD z y g zz)))%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
   (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz ff ;; gg) ;; 
 HD z x (f · g) zz)%mor_disp =
((tr mor_disp xx (HD z x (f · g) zz)
  cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] zz
                                                 gg)) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
    (transportb
       (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧,
        HD y x f (HD z y g zz) -->[ z0] zz)
       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          g f) (HD y x f (HD z y g zz) ;; HD z y g zz))) ;; 
 HD z x (f · g) zz)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp) =
((tr mor_disp xx (HD z x (f · g) zz)
  cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] zz
                                                 gg)) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)
    (transportb
       (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧,
        HD y x f (HD z y g zz) -->[ z0] zz)
       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          g f) (HD y x f (HD z y g zz) ;; HD z y g zz))) ;; 
 HD z x (f · g) zz)%mor_disp

  cartesian_factorisation (HD z x (f · g) zz) (id₁ x)

       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof

 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp) =

D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))
                                                 (id₁

                                                 (HD z
