                                                 gg)) ;; 
                                                (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz) ;; 
                                                 HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] zz
                                                 gg)) ;; 
                                                (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz) ;; 
                                                 HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp) =
?b
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 mor_disp
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; 
                                                 cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 z ⟧,
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] zz
                                                 gg)) ;; 
                                                (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz) ;; 
                                                 HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp) =
?b

        
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f (HD z y g zz))
   (id₁ x)
   (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
    HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                     (HD z y g zz) (id₁ y)
                     (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧,
                         yy -->[ z0] zz gg)) ;; (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz) ;; 
                                                 HD z
                                                 y g
                                                 zz))%mor_disp =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb (mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz)
  (assoc (id₁ x) f g)
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f (HD z y g zz))
     (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
      HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                       (HD z y g zz) (id₁ y)
                       (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧,
                           yy -->[ z0] zz gg)) ;; 
   HD y x f (HD z y g zz) ;; HD z y g zz)%mor_disp =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb (mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz)
  (assoc (id₁ x) f g)
  ((tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
    HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                     (HD z y g zz) (id₁ y)
                     (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧,
                         yy -->[ z0] zz gg)) ;; HD z y
                                                 g zz)%mor_disp =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
 ((tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD z y g zz)
   HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                    (HD z y g zz) (id₁ y)
                    (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧,
                        yy -->[ z0] zz gg)) ;; HD z y
                                                 g zz)%mor_disp) =
?t2

(tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
 (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
  (HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                    (HD z y g zz) (id₁ y)
                    (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧,
                        yy -->[ z0] zz gg) ;; HD z y g
                                                zz)%mor_disp)) =
?t2

(tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
 (HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation (HD z y g zz)
                   (id₁ y)
                   (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧,
                       yy -->[ z0] zz gg) ;; HD z y g

 (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
  (HD y x f yy ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                     (HD z y g zz) (id₁ y)
                     (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧,
                         yy -->[ z0] zz gg) ;; HD z y
                                                 g zz))%mor_disp)) =
?t2

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
 (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
  (HD y x f yy ;; (tr λ z0 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧,
                      yy -->[ z0] zz gg))%mor_disp)) =
?t2

HD: cleaving D

yy: pr1 D y

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
 (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
  (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
   (HD y x f yy ;; gg)%mor_disp))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C

yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) zz
 (HD y x f yy ;; gg)%mor_disp) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; (tr 
                                                mor_disp
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)
                                                 zz
                                                HD y x
                                                 f yy ;; gg))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (tr mor_disp xx zz
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; gg))%mor_disp)) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; (HD y x
                                                 f yy ;; gg))%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category

HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (assoc (id₁ x) f g)
   (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy ;; gg)%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (tr mor_disp xx zz
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; HD y x
                                                 f yy ;; gg)%mor_disp)) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; HD y x
                                                 f yy ;; gg)%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

D: disp_univalent_category C

yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy ff) ;; gg)%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz
 (tr mor_disp xx zz (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(tr mor_disp xx zz (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp) =
(tr λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz
 (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
zz: pr1 D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
cancel_postcomposition f (id₁ x · f) g
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data_subproof
     x y f) @
! assoc (id₁ x) f g @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data_subproof
        y z g) @
   assoc f (id₁ y) g @
   cancel_postcomposition (f · id₁ y) (id₁ x · f) g
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @ ! assoc (id₁ x) f g) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          g f)) @
assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · (f · g)) @
assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (f · g) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
  (f · g)
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x)) @ id_right (id₁ x)) =
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data_subproof
  x z (f · g)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D
          (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                   (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data D HD).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D
          (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                   (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data
     D HD)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_axioms D HD).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv D
     HD)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv D
     HD)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (♯ (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD) ff)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_z_isomorphism
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso y)
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
HD x y f xx -->[ id₁ y] yy
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(?Goal ;; cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
            (id₁ y)
            (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (HD x y f xx) (HD x y f xx))
  (id_left (id₁ y)) (id_disp (HD x y f xx))
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; ?Goal)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (id_left (id₁ y))
  (id_disp yy)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
HD x y f xx -->[ id₁ y] yy
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
HD x y f xx -->[ id₁ y · f] xx

      exact (transportb
               (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
               (id_left _)
               (HD x y f xx)).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(cartesian_factorisation Hff (id₁ y)
   (transportb
      (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx)
      (id_left f) (HD x y f xx)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (HD x y f xx)
                                      (id₁ y)
                                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ y,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          yy -->[
                                          z] xx ff))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (HD x y f xx) (HD x y f xx))
  (id_left (id₁ y)) (id_disp (HD x y f xx))
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(cartesian_factorisation Hff (id₁ y)
   (transportb
      (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx)
      (id_left f) (HD x y f xx)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (HD x y f xx)
                                      (id₁ y)
                                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ y,
                                                x ⟧,
                                          yy -->[
                                          z] xx ff) ;; 
 HD x y f xx)%mor_disp =
(transportb (mor_disp (HD x y f xx) (HD x y f xx))
   (id_left (id₁ y)) (id_disp (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD x y
                                                 f xx)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(cartesian_factorisation Hff (id₁ y)
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
    HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                      (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
                      (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
                          yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; HD x y
                                                 f xx)%mor_disp =
((tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) (HD x y f xx)
  id_disp (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD x y f xx)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (cartesian_factorisation Hff (id₁ y)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
     HD x y f xx) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                        (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
                        (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
                            yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx))%mor_disp) =
((tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) (HD x y f xx)
  id_disp (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD x y f xx)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (cartesian_factorisation Hff (id₁ y)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
     HD x y f xx) ;; (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
                         yy -->[ z] xx ff))%mor_disp) =
((tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) (HD x y f xx)
  id_disp (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD x y f xx)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (id₁ y)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
      HD x y f xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp)) =
((tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) (HD x y f xx)
  id_disp (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD x y f xx)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (id₁ y)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
      HD x y f xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp)) =
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (id_disp (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
   HD x y f xx))) =
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (id_disp (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
   HD x y f xx))) =
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 transportb (mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx) (id_left f)
   (HD x y f xx))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
   HD x y f xx))) =
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx
 (tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx HD x y f xx))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, HD x y f xx -->[ z] xx
 HD x y f xx) =
(tr mor_disp (HD x y f xx) xx HD x y f xx)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
! id_left f @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ y))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data_subproof
     y x f) @ assoc (id₁ y) (id₁ y) f =
! id_left f @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ y) (id₁ y · id₁ y) f
  (! id_left (id₁ y))

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                Hff
                                                (id₁ y)
                                                (transportb
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 f)
                                                 (HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx)))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (id_left (id₁ y))
  (id_disp yy)
 
C: univalent_category

HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                Hff
                                                (id₁ y)
                                                (transportb
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 f)
                                                 (HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx)) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
(transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (id_left (id₁ y))
   (id_disp yy) ;; ff)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx

(cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                Hff
                                                (id₁ y)
                                                (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                                 HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
((tr mor_disp yy yy id_disp yy) ;; ff)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp yy xx
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hff
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] xx
                                                 HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx) ;; ff))%mor_disp) =
((tr mor_disp yy yy id_disp yy) ;; ff)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x

Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp yy xx
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; (tr 
                                                λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                HD x y
                                                 f xx -->[
                                                z] xx
                                                HD x y
                                                 f xx))%mor_disp) =
((tr mor_disp yy yy id_disp yy) ;; ff)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category

HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp yy xx
 (tr mor_disp yy xx
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; HD x y
                                                 f xx)%mor_disp)) =
((tr mor_disp yy yy id_disp yy) ;; ff)%mor_disp

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr mor_disp yy xx
 (tr mor_disp yy xx
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx) (id₁ y)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) ;; HD x y
                                                 f xx)%mor_disp)) =
(tr mor_disp yy xx (id_disp yy ;; ff)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx

 (tr mor_disp yy xx
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff))) =
(tr mor_disp yy xx (id_disp yy ;; ff)%mor_disp)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x

ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff

 (tr mor_disp yy xx
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff))) =
(tr mor_disp yy xx
 transportb (mor_disp yy xx) (id_left f) ff)

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

Hff: is_cartesian ff

 (tr mor_disp yy xx
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff))) =
(tr mor_disp yy xx (tr mor_disp yy xx ff))

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
(tr λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx ff) =
(tr mor_disp yy xx ff)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data_subproof
  y x f @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ y)) (! id_left f) @
assoc (id₁ y) (id₁ y) f =
! id_left f @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ y) (id₁ y · id₁ y) f
  (! id_left (id₁ y))

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ FF : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D
          (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                   (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))),
 is_cartesian_disp_functor FF) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_functor (functor_identity C) D
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv D HD).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ FF : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D
          (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                   (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))),
 is_cartesian_disp_functor FF)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv D
     HD)
 exact (is_cartesian_psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv D HD).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD))

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
xx -->[ id₁ x] HD x x (id₁ x) xx

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
id₁ x = id₁ x · id₁ x

    exact (!(id_left _)).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data D
     HD)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data D
     HD)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (disp_functor_identity
      (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))))) ff ;; 
 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data D HD
   y yy)%mor_disp =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))) x
        xx)
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
           D HD)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
           D HD) y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x
     y f)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data D
     HD x xx ;; ♯ (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                        D HD)
                     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
                        D HD)) ff)%mor_disp

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
 ((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy))
   ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
           (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
           (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                 (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
            HD y x f yy ;; psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data
                             D HD y yy)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                              (HD y x
                                                 (f
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ y)
                                                 yy)
                                              (id₁ x)
                                              (transportb
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) -->[
                                                 z] yy)
                                                 (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) f)
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                                 HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy)))%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   ((tr mor_disp xx (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy))
     psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data D
       HD x xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                    (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy))
                    (id₁ x)
                    (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx)
                          (HD y x f yy)
                     HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                            (HD y x f
                                               yy)
                                            (id₁ x)
                                            (tr λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                xx -->[
                                                z] yy
                                             (tr λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] yy
                                              ff ;; 
                                              HD y x f
                                                yy)))) ;; 
    cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
      (id₁ x)
      (transportb
         (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
          HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy)
         (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
            f (id₁ x))
         (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
 ((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy))
   ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
           (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
           (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                 (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
            HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
                             (id₁ y)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
                                 yy -->[ z] yy
                              id_disp yy))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x
                                                 (f
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ y)
                                                 yy)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) -->[
                                                 z] yy)
                                                 (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) f)
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                                 HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy)))%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   ((tr mor_disp xx (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy))
     cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx)
       (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
     cartesian_factorisation
       (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
       (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
        HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                               (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                               (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                   xx -->[ z] yy
                                (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                    xx -->[ z] yy
                                 ff ;; HD y x f yy)))) ;; 
    cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
      (id₁ x)
      (transportb
         (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
          HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy)
         (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
            f (id₁ x))
         (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)))%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
 (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
  (ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
           (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
           (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                 (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
            HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
                             (id₁ y)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
                                 yy -->[ z] yy
                              id_disp yy)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                (HD y
                                                 x
                                                 (f
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ y)
                                                 yy)
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (transportb
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) -->[
                                                 z] yy)
                                                 (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) f)
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                                 HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy)))%mor_disp)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
    (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx)
       (id₁ x)
       (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
     cartesian_factorisation
       (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
       (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
        HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                               (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                               (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                   xx -->[ z] yy
                                (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                    xx -->[ z] yy
                                 ff ;; HD y x f yy))) ;; 
     cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
       (id₁ x)
       (transportb
          (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy)
          (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
             f (id₁ x))
          (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)))%mor_disp))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
 (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
  (ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
           (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
           (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                 (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
            HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
                             (id₁ y)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
                                 yy -->[ z] yy
                              id_disp yy)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                (HD y
                                                 x
                                                 (f
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ y)
                                                 yy)
                                                (id₁ x)
                                                (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) -->[
                                                 z] yy
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                                 HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy))%mor_disp)) =
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx)
      (id₁ x)
      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
    cartesian_factorisation
      (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
      (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
       HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                              (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                              (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                  xx -->[ z] yy
                               (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                   xx -->[ z] yy
                                ff ;; HD y x f yy))) ;; 
    cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
      (id₁ x)
      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
          HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
       HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))%mor_disp)))

x, y: C

xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y

(tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
 (ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
          (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
          (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
           HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                            (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
                            (id₁ y)
                            (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
                                yy -->[ z] yy
                             id_disp yy)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                               (HD y x
                                                 (f
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ y)
                                                 yy)
                                               (id₁ x)
                                               (tr 
                                                λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                HD y x
                                                 f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) -->[
                                                z] yy
                                                HD y x
                                                 f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                                HD y y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy))%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))%mor_disp))

((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
  ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
          (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
          (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)

                                                 y ⟧,

                                                 f
                                                 (HD y

                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                                HD y y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy)) ;; 
 HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp =
((tr mor_disp xx yy
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;;

                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))) ;; 
 HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp

 (ff ;; cartesian_factorisation
          (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
          (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
           HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation

                                yy -->[ z] yy

                                                z :

                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) -->[

                                                 f

                                                 y) yy) ;; 
  HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp) = ?b
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
((tr mor_disp xx yy
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))) ;; 
 HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp

                                                 (f
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp)) =
?b

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation
           (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
           (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                 (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
            HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
                             (id₁ y)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
                                 yy -->[ z] yy
                              id_disp yy)) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD y
                                                 x
                                                 (f
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ y)
                                                 yy)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 x)
                                                 (tr 
                                                 λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) -->[
                                                 z] yy
                                                 HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                                 HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                               HD y x
                                                 (f
                                                 · 
                                                 id₁ y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp) =
?b

D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation
           (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
           (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                 (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
            HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
                             (id₁ y)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
                                 yy -->[ z] yy
                              id_disp yy)) ;; (tr 
                                               λ z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                               HD y x
                                                 f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) -->[
                                               z] yy
                                               HD y x
                                                 f
                                                 (HD y
                                                 y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy) ;; 
                                               HD y y
                                                 (id₁
                                                 y) yy)))%mor_disp) =
?b

  (ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation
            (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
            (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy)
                  (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)

C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(cartesian_factorisation
   (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
   (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
    HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                     (HD y y (id₁ y) yy) (id₁ y)
                     (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
                         yy -->[ z] yy id_disp yy)) ;; 
 (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy) ;; HD y y (id₁ y) yy))%mor_disp =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (HD y x f yy) yy)
  (assoc (id₁ x) f (id₁ y))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD y x f yy) (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)
      HD y x f yy ;; cartesian_factorisation
                       (HD y y (id₁ y) yy) (id₁ y)
                       (tr λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
                           yy -->[ z] yy id_disp yy)) ;; 
   HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy) ;; HD y y (id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp =
?t2

        apply idpath.

          (assoc (id₁ x) f (id₁ y))
          (cartesian_factorisation
             (HD y x f (HD y y (id₁ y) yy)) (id₁ x)

           HD y y (id₁ y) yy))%mor_disp) = ?b

  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (ff ;; (HD y x f yy ;; id_disp yy))%mor_disp) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (ff ;; transportb (mor_disp (HD y x f yy) yy)
          (id_right f) (HD y x f yy))%mor_disp) = 
?b

?b

D: disp_univalent_category C

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

      apply idpath.
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy (ff ;; HD y x f yy)%mor_disp) =
((tr mor_disp xx yy
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))) ;; 
 HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr mor_disp xx yy
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))) ;; 
 HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp =
(tr mor_disp xx yy (ff ;; HD y x f yy)%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr mor_disp xx yy
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))) ;; 
 HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp = ?b
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b = (tr mor_disp xx yy (ff ;; HD y x f yy)%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr mor_disp xx yy
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))) ;; 
 HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
  cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation
    (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
     HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                            (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                            (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                xx -->[ z] yy
                             ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
    (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
     HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))
 · idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)) $ h) yy)
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)) ;; HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp =
?b

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  idtoiso
    (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f))) ;; HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp =
?b

((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation

                                 xx -->[ z] yy

         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  idtoiso
    (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f))) ;; HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp =
