C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
 ((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  idtoiso
    (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)))%mor_disp) = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
idtoiso
  (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y
          f)) = ?t2

        apply idtoiso_fiber_category.
      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)
  (tr mor_disp xx (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  pr1
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
          (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
               x y f)))) ;; HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp =
?b

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (tr mor_disp xx yy
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy) ;; 
   pr1
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
           (! is_nat_trans_id
                (functor_identity_data C) x y f))) ;; 
   HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation
    (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
     HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                            (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                            (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                xx -->[ z] yy
                             ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
    (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
     HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy) ;; 
  pr1
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
          (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
               x y f))) ;; HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp) =
?b

     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (tr mor_disp xx yy
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy) ;; 
   (pr1
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
            (! is_nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data C) x y f))) ;; 
    HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy))%mor_disp)) = ?b

C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(pr1
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x h yy)
         (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
              x y f))) ;; HD y x (f · id₁ y) yy)%mor_disp =
?t2

        apply idtoiso_disp_cartesian_lift.
      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation
    (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
     HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                            (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                            (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                xx -->[ z] yy
                             ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)
     (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy) ;; 
   (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
       HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy -->[ z] yy
    HD y x (id₁ x · f) yy)))%mor_disp) = ?b

  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat

        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y

(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation
    (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
     HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation

                                xx -->[ z] yy
                             ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) -->[ z] yy

D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat

        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x

  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  cartesian_factorisation
    (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
    (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
     HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                            (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                            (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                xx -->[ z] yy
                             ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
  (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy))%mor_disp) =

C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
   (assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)
   (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx)
      (id₁ x)
      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
    cartesian_factorisation
      (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
      (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
       HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                              (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                              (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                  xx -->[ z] yy
                               ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
    HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)%mor_disp) =
?b

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (tr mor_disp xx yy
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy)) (id₁ x)
     (tr mor_disp (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (HD y x f yy)
      HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                             (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
                             (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                 xx -->[ z] yy
                              ff ;; HD y x f yy)) ;; 
   HD x x (id₁ x) (HD y x f yy) ;; HD y x f yy)%mor_disp)) =
?b

   HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; (ff ;; HD y x f yy))%mor_disp)) =
?b

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  HD x x (id₁ x) xx ;; (ff ;; HD y x f yy))%mor_disp) =
?b

        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 ((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx) ;; 
  (ff ;; HD y x f yy))%mor_disp) = ?b

 transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left (id₁ x · f))

C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor

(tr mor_disp xx yy (ff ;; HD y x f yy)%mor_disp) = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy (ff ;; HD y x f yy)%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx yy (ff ;; HD y x f yy)%mor_disp)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! id_left (id₁ x · f) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · f) (! id_left (id₁ x)) @
! assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · f) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
        x y f @
      psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data_subproof
        x y f)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f) @
assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x · id₁ x) f @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · (id₁ x · id₁ x))
  (id₁ x · (id₁ x · id₁ x)) f
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (id_right (id₁ x) @ ! id_left (id₁ x))) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · (id₁ x · id₁ x))
  (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) f
  (assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) @
! assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) f @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x · id₁ x))
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f
       (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x · id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y
          f @ ! id_left (f · id₁ y))) @
assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · (f · id₁ y)) @
assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (f · id₁ y) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x) (f · id₁ y)
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x)
     (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
        (id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x)) @ id_right (id₁ x))) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
  (f · id₁ y) (id_right (id₁ x)) =
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (! id_right f) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose f) (! id_left (id₁ y))) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x)) (assoc f (id₁ y) (id₁ y)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (cancel_postcomposition (f · id₁ y) (id₁ x · f)
     (id₁ y) (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (! assoc (id₁ x) f (id₁ y)) @
maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
  (maponpaths (compose (id₁ x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          (id₁ y) f)) @
assoc (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (id₁ x · (f · id₁ y)) @
assoc (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x) (f · id₁ y) @
cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
  (f · id₁ y)
  (cancel_postcomposition (id₁ x · id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (id₁ x) (id_right (id₁ x)) @ id_right (id₁ x))

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD))

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD))
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_identity
            (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
               D HD)
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
               D HD)), disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
              (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD))
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data D HD).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_identity
            (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
               D HD)
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
               D HD)), disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data D
     HD)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_laws D HD).
  Defined.

  Definition psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_data
             (D : disp_univalent_category C)
             (HD : cleaving D)
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv D HD)
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D HD))
        (disp_functor_identity _)
    := λ x xx, id_disp _.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_data D
     HD)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_data D
     HD)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
  cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy zz) ;; HD y x
                                                 f yy) ;; 
 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_data D
   HD y yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_data D
     HD x xx ;; zz)%mor_disp

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: xx -->[ f] yy
((tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
  cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy zz) ;; HD y x
                                                 f yy) ;; 
 id_disp
   (disp_functor_over_id_composite
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
         D HD)
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
         HD) y yy))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
           D HD)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
           D HD) x xx) ;; zz)%mor_disp

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f)
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
   (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
      (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy zz) ;; HD y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy)%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) zz)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr mor_disp xx yy
 (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy zz) ;; HD y x
                                                 f yy)%mor_disp)) =
(tr mor_disp xx yy (tr mor_disp xx yy zz))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
 (cartesian_factorisation (HD y x f yy) (id₁ x)
    (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy zz) ;; HD y x
                                                 f yy)%mor_disp) =
(tr mor_disp xx yy zz)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy
 (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy zz)) =
(tr mor_disp xx yy zz)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: xx -->[ f] yy
(tr λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy zz) =
(tr mor_disp xx yy zz)

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: xx -->[ f] yy
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv_data_subproof
  x y f @
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_data_subproof
  x y f @ ! id_right f =
! id_left f @
! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)) (disp_functor_identity D)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)) (disp_functor_identity D)

HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)) (disp_functor_identity D)
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
               D HD)
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
               D HD)) (disp_functor_identity D),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
        D HD)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor D
        HD)) (disp_functor_identity D)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_data D HD).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
               D HD)
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
               D HD)) (disp_functor_identity D),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_data D
     HD)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_laws D HD).
  Defined.

  (**
   7. The unit is a pointwise adjoint equivalence
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
left_equivalence
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit (D,, HD))

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
left_equivalence
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit (D,, HD))

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
fib_slice_bicat C
⟦ id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C) (D,, HD),
comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C) (D,, HD) ⟧
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
id₁
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C) (D,, HD)) ==>
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit (D,, HD) · ?pr1
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ _ : id₁
         (comp_psfunctor
            (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
            (D,, HD)) ==>
       psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit (D,, HD) · ?pr1,
 ?pr1 · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit (D,, HD) ==>
 id₁ (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C) (D,, HD)))
  ?pr10
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) ?pr11

    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
fib_slice_bicat C
⟦ id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C) (D,, HD),
comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C) (D,, HD) ⟧
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv D HD).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
id₁
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C) (D,, HD)) ==>
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit (D,, HD)
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv
    D HD
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ _ : id₁
         (comp_psfunctor
            (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
            (D,, HD)) ==>
       psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit (D,, HD)
       · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv
           D HD,
 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv
   D HD · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit (D,, HD) ==>
 id₁ (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C) (D,, HD)))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit D HD).
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv
        D HD,,
      psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD,,
      psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit D
        HD))
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
is_invertible_2cell
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: pr1
  (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob C
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) x)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD x
     xx)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: pr1
  (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob C
     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD))) x
is_z_isomorphism
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD x
     xx)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
is_z_isomorphism
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data D
     HD x xx)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
is_z_isomorphism
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
     (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
is_z_iso_disp
  (z_iso_comp (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)
     (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x))
  (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx id_disp xx)

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (id_disp xx)

      apply id_is_z_iso_disp.
    
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv
               D HD,,
             psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit
               D HD,,
             psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit
               D HD)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv
         D HD,,
       psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD,,
       psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit D
         HD)))
  (is_invertible_2cell_fib_slice C
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD)
     ((λ (x : C)
       (xx : pr1
               (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob C
                  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))
               x),
       is_z_iso_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))
         (pr1
            (disp_functor_identity
               (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))),,
             disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor
               (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat
                     (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat D HD)))))
            x xx)
         (pr1
            (disp_functor_over_id_composite
               (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                  D HD)
               (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
                  D HD),,
             disp_functor_over_id_composite_is_cartesian
               (is_cartesian_psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor
                  D HD)
               (is_cartesian_psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_disp_functor_inv
                  D HD)) x xx)
         (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D
            HD x xx)
         ((is_z_iso_fiber_from_is_z_iso_disp
             (cartesian_factorisation
                (HD x x (id₁ x) xx) (id₁ x)
                (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
                 id_disp xx))
             (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation
                (identity_is_z_iso x)
                (identity_is_z_iso x)
                (HD x x (id₁ x) xx)
                (tr λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx
                 id_disp xx)
                (is_z_iso_disp_transportf_fun_eq
                   (id_disp xx) (! id_left (id₁ x))
                   (id_is_z_iso_disp xx)))
           :
           is_z_isomorphism
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit_data
                D HD x xx))
          :
          is_z_isomorphism
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit
               D HD x xx)))
      :
      is_disp_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D
           HD))
   :
   is_invertible_2cell
     (left_adjoint_unit
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv
           D HD,,
         psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D
           HD,,
         psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit
           D HD)))
 
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
  (left_adjoint_counit
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_cartesian_disp_functor_inv
        D HD,,
      psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_unit D HD,,
      psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit D
        HD))

      
C: univalent_category
D: disp_univalent_category C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: pr1 (id_psfunctor (fib_slice_bicat C) (D,, HD)) x
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) x)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_unit_equiv_counit_data D
     HD x xx)

      apply id_is_z_iso_disp.
  Defined.
End GrothendieckConstruction.
